title: Audi Dealership
summary: Interactive dealership experiences and shopper marketing.
overview: Audi wanted to elevate their dealership shopping experience. We created interactive displays to assist the car-buying process, no matter where shoppers were in their journey.
approach: We built an interactive display system with model-specific pages, innovation experiences, and highlighted offers. Year-round, we created powerful imagery for dealerships to promote offerings.The interactive displays let shoppers learn and explore Audi's technology throughout their path to purchase.
outcome: Hundreds of test drives were scheduled and our work became known throughout Audi, securing us talks with other executives to expand the account.
